name: Forced by Trump to retire, a trans airman is ‘passing the torch’ to a firefighter waiting to serve
summary: Ending a career he did not want to leave, Master Sgt. Logan Ireland is still fighting to pass on the "opportunity to succeed" in military service to his mentee Clayton McCallister. A review of 58 empirical studies on transgender military service, published in the International Journal of Transgender Health and led by University of Nevada, Las Vegas professor Kati McNamara, found no evidence supporting the core claims used to justify excluding transgender people from service.

name: Can you say Pioche, Mina and Hiko like a true Nevadan? Take the quiz
summary: If you're new to the state or just visiting, you may have been met with eyerolls whenever you try to say Nevada. Say Nuh-VAH-duh in a crowd of Nevadans and expect weird looks. To locals, the Silver State is pronounced Nuh-VĂD-uh. Yet politicians, celebrities and out-of-towners keep getting it wrong.

name: Nevada education leaders approve plans for new Vegas Loop station at UNLV
summary: Board votes to allow Vegas Loop station on campus with 25% student discount

name: Boring Company gets green light to build Vegas Loop station at UNLV
summary: A Vegas Loop station at the UNLV campus has taken another step toward becoming reality.

name: Boring Co. Vegas Loop station approved for UNLV campus
summary: A UNLV campus station for the Boring Co.’s Vegas Loop system was approved Monday by the Board of Regents in a meeting despite complaints about the company’s record of environmental and workplace safety.

name: Affordable healthcare emerges as a voter priority in purple Nevada
summary: One issue will decide Steven Cohen's vote for Nevada governor this fall: Which candidate can best protect him from getting kicked off Medicaid?

name: 'It's a place to heal:' 1 October memorial still $7M short as groundbreaking nears
summary: Despite supportive community efforts, the Vegas Strong Fund continues to raise funds for the project set to break ground in October.

name: Who still counts as Native American in 2026?
summary: Native Americans are reclaiming traditions and learning languages their ancestors were beaten for speaking. But after centuries of repression, migration and intermarriage, a debate is raging about who gets to call themselves Indian.

name: UNLV’s medical school campus hits major environmental milestone
summary: The Kirk Kerkorian School of Medicine at UNLV has received LEED Platinum Certification for the operations and maintenance of its Medical Education Building, the highest tier in the world’s most widely used green building rating system, university officials said in a news release.
